descriptions.description: The 3ml Tola bottle with a 14.3mm neck brings a decorative shape to sample sizes. Perfume oil and essential oil brands use this for gift sets and collector formats. A distinctive silhouette for artisan and heritage positioning.

The 4ml frosted heart bottle with an 8mm keychain cap suits mini perfume and fragrance oil formats. Wedding favors, gift sets, and promotional packaging use this for a playful, decorative option. The keychain adds portability.

The 5ml marble bottle with a 17.52mm neck offers a sculptural shape for perfume oil and essential oil. Decorative and gift brands choose this for a unique, collectible format. The marble-like silhouette stands out on display.
A 6ml Tola bottle with a 14.3mm neck for perfume oil and essential oil samples. The decorative shape suits gift sets and artisan positioning. A compact format with a distinctive profile.

The 10ml marble bottle with a 17.52mm neck suits perfume oil and fragrance oil formats. Decorative and gift brands use this for a mid-size collectible option. The sculptural shape appeals to luxury and artisan positioning.

The 32ml cobalt blue genie bottle with a ground glass stopper brings a decorative, vintage aesthetic. Perfume oil and fragrance brands use this for a statement piece. Cobalt glass protects light-sensitive formulations.

A 35ml cobalt blue Eternal Flame bottle with a ground glass stopper. Perfume and fragrance oil brands choose this for a decorative, collectible format. The ornate silhouette suits gift and luxury positioning.

The 355ml pear bottle with a ground glass stopper suits large-volume decants and refillable formats. Perfume oil, essential oil, and aromatic blend brands use this for a decorative, statement piece. A distinctive shape for vanity and retail displays.
